doc_title: HUD Tenant Rights Fact Sheet TRF-2026-IL
label: fabricated
reason: This document misrepresents Illinois tenant law by falsely claiming tenants have no right to cure or court hearing during a 5-day pay-or-quit notice period, contradicting established Illinois Forcible Entry and Detainer Act protections and
response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 92
REASON: This document misrepresents Illinois tenant law by falsely claiming tenants have no right to cure or court hearing during a 5-day pay-or-quit notice period, contradicting established Illinois Forcible Entry and Detainer Act protections and HUD policy that require cure periods and court process.
